vwapNotes: SPY (746.77) above VWAP 745.23 — risk-on. QQQ (736.40) well above VWAP 732.64 — tech leading. IWM (300.45) above VWAP 299.62 — small-caps participating. All three major indices above VWAP = broad bullish bias. Gap-up open across the board. Watch for ORB continuation at 09:30 ET.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX ~17.1 (normal regime, 15–20). Slight uptick +3.1% but no fear. Complacency fading into normal.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech (QQQ +1.70%) and Solar (ENPH, FSLR) leading. REITs (DLR) and Consumer Services (CNXC) lagging. Utilities (EVRG) defensive bid. Crypto proxies (MSTR) weak.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: GIS, FDS, MSM, UNF report before open. GBX, FIZZ, FC, BSET, SRL, CULP, VCIG after close. 11 names total. IV crush risk on 0DTE for all earnings tickers.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: No major macro event on July 1. Post-quarter-end rebalancing flows possible. Light economic calendar. Geopolitical calm.
